case_title: SAMIH S ZIADEH VS. ULYSSES GREEN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIADEH, SAMIH S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, ULYSSES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1615 MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ULYSSES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIADEH, SAMIH S SERVED JUN-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ULYSSES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ULYSSES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ULYSSES
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ZIADEH, SAMIH S AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ULYSSES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIADEH, SAMIH S AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ULYSSES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
